name: Beef & Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound Boneless beef sirloin or -top round steak, 3/4 inch thick, sliced across the grain into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, heat one tablespoon oil. Cook the beef until browned, stirring often. Remove and set aside.
2. Reduce the heat to medium. In the remaining oil, cook the broccoli and onion with garlic until tender-crisp.
3. Stir in the soup, water, and soy sauce. Bring to a boil.
4. Return the beef to the skillet. Heat through, stirring often.
5. Serve over rice.
Serves 4.
From a Campbell's Soup Advertisement, October 1993 Reader's Digest.
